subcodes.first_line: O steadfast one in the Covenant and cherished memorial of that loving friend! Your letter was received and its contents noted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان و یادگار آن یار مهربان مکتوب شما رسید و بر مضمون اطلاع حاصل
subcodes.subjects: @non-participation in politics, @obedience to and respect for government authority, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
